# Assets

This folder holds the images referenced by the root `README.md`:

| File | Used for | Suggested size |
|---|---|---|
| `banner.png` | README hero banner | 1280×400 |
| `screenshot-landing.png` | Landing page screenshot | 1280×800 |
| `screenshot-dashboard.png` | Dashboard screenshot | 1280×800 |
| `screenshot-devtools.png` | Developer Tools screenshot | 1280×800 |
| `demo.gif` | Product demo (connect → register → feedback) | ≤ 8 MB, ≤ 15s |

None of these are committed yet — the README references are placeholders. Capture real screenshots/GIF from a running instance (`npm run dev`) before publishing the repo, then drop the files in here with the exact names above and the README images will resolve automatically.
